system.security.passwordHash.desc: SHA-512 hash of the admin password. Set via the CMS login/security page, never edited directly.
system.security.passkeys.desc: WebAuthn passkeys registered for passwordless login.
system.security.passkey.label: Device Label
system.security.passkey.label.desc: Human-readable label for this passkey (e.g. 'My YubiKey', 'Chrome on MacBook').
auth.setup.title: Create Admin Password
auth.setup.hint: This is the first time you're setting up Chronicle. Choose a strong password.
auth.setup.tokenHint: Your setup token was printed when the server started. Check your terminal logs, or run: npx chronicle show-token
auth.setup.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.setup.success: Setup complete. You can now log in.
auth.setup.saveCodesPrompt:
Save these recovery codes. They will not be shown again.
Each code can be used once to reset your password.
auth.login.title: Log In
auth.recover.title: Recover Access
auth.recover.hint: Enter one of your recovery codes to reset your password.
auth.recover.invalid: Invalid or already used recovery code.
auth.recover.locked: Too many attempts. Try again in {minutes} minutes.
auth.recover.success: Recovery code accepted. Set a new password.
auth.recover.noCodes:
No recovery codes left. You must reset via CLI:
  npx chronicle reset-password
auth.reset.title: Reset Password
auth.reset.success: Password has been reset. New recovery codes generated.
